title: object relations
content:
# object relations

How objects relate across the 21 document models in the Powerhouse ecosystem. The primary reference type is PHID for cross-model links and OID for intra-model references. See [[ecosystem map]] for the full model inventory organized by functional zone.

## Cross-Model Hierarchy (Local Project)
- [[five models form a hierarchy from facet through template to offering to subscription to instance]] — the core reference graph in this project's 5 models

## Local Models (this project)
- [[service-offering model defines tiered pricing with option groups and service groups]] — the central model with the most internal references (tiers ↔ groups ↔ services ↔ options)
- [[subscription-instance model tracks active customer subscriptions with lifecycle state]] — mirrors offering structure with billing actuals
- [[resource-template model defines reusable service catalog blueprints]] — base catalog structure without pricing
- [[resource-instance model tracks provisioned resource lifecycle]] — provisioned resource with facet configuration
- [[facet model provides configurable classification dimensions]] — referenced by templates, offerings, and instances
- [[service-subscription model tracks service-level subscription agreements]] — agreement-level subscription tracking

## Cross-Zone References
- [[builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities]] — SO.operatorId references this (Service & Pricing → Organization)
- [[billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries]] — SI produces billing statements (Service & Pricing → Finance)
- [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]] — SI charges become invoice line items (Service & Pricing → Reporting)

## Cross-Model Data Bridges
- [[mapOfferingToSubscription transforms service offering state into subscription initialization]] — the primary offering → subscription bridge

## Key Reference Patterns

**PHID references (cross-model, local):**
- `ServiceOffering.operatorId` → [[builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities]]
- `ServiceOffering.resourceTemplateId` → ResourceTemplate
- `SubscriptionInstance.serviceOfferingId` → ServiceOffering
- `ResourceInstance.resourceTemplateId` → ResourceTemplate

**PHID references (cross-zone):**
- SubscriptionInstance → [[billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries]]
- SubscriptionInstance → [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]]
- ScopeOfWork → [[builder-profile model describes individual contributor identities]] (assignees)
- ScopeOfWork → [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]] (milestone billing)

**OID references (intra-model):**
- `Service.serviceGroupId` → ServiceGroup
- `Service.optionGroupId` → OptionGroup
- `ServiceGroupTierPricing.tierId` → Tier
- `ServiceLevelBinding.serviceId` → Service
- `ServiceUsageLimit.serviceId` → Service

---

- [[index]]
description: Cross-object references within and across document models -- PHID links between models, OID references within models
